speaker: vo
text: Independent bakeries throw out 30 to 40 percent of what they make. The waste is uncertainty, not ignorance.  BakerySense — powered by Gemma 4.  Sign in with the bakery's tenant slug, email, and password. The interesting part is what comes next.  Sales history loaded — per SKU, per branch, per day. The forecaster trains on this.  LightGBM trees, seven quantile heads. Pure TypeScript inside a Cloudflare Worker.  Today's bake plan — newsvendor-picked from the forecast. Switch branches: same model, different demand shape.  Open a SKU. The quantile band shows where demand is likely to land; the driver bars show why.  Click Ask Gemma why. The question is prefilled and sent to Gemma 4. It calls the forecaster, reads the top drivers, and grounds the answer in the numbers.  At end of day, one photo is enough. Gemma 4 counts what is left.  Gemma 4 counts the display case and suggests markdowns.  Sign out. The session ends, the tokens revoke, and the page returns to sign-in.  Within two months, the model learns the bakery better than the baker remembers it.
